About

I build things, then write about them.

Quantitative researcher and developer based in Kolkata. I spend most of my time writing Python, TypeScript, and SQL — and thinking about markets, systems, and how things actually work underneath the surface.

This blog is where I put everything that doesn’t fit anywhere else — project write-ups, technical notes, things I found interesting, and the occasional thought I couldn’t stop thinking about.

you’ll find → project notes · technical write-ups · things I like · misc thoughts
stack → Python · TypeScript · Vim · Linux
elsewhere → github.com/nilarkian

Built, coded and written by Saptak
